parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="<b>Release: ready</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="180" x="210" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DEV" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="<b>Development lane</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DECOMP" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="<b>Decompose</b><br>Plan: Design → Develop → style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="<b>Phase Specialist Agent</b><br>scope phase → Work Tasks" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="<b>Reconciliation gate</b><br>Design settled + no blocking findings (FND)?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="230" x="185" y="1140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MERGE" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="verify by result →<br>merge each branch" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="240" x="180" y="1230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="COMPLETE" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="complete phase →<br>PI: In Review" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="240" x="180" y="1290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QA" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="<b>Release QA gate</b><br>design covers every requirement?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="230" x="185" y="1370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="TEST" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NOTE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=11;fontColor=#666666;" value="Note: in a release-driven run,
